batches.name: Kinetic Update Batch A
batches.rationale: Independent style updates for BotStream, LayerLogic, GridironFlow, and NeoBrutalism.

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for BotStream
tasks.prompt: On branch 'top-20-designs', implement the 'bot-stream' style page (app/styles/bot-stream/page.tsx) and a 'DESIGN_SYSTEM.md' in the same folder. Follow the 'Kinetic Design Protocol': 1. Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with SVG liquid blobs that merge/split on scroll, 'Breathing Orb' hero element reactive to scroll, velocity-driven background ripple effects, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage. Ensure the code is heavily commented.

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for LayerLogic
tasks.prompt: On branch 'top-20-designs', implement the 'layer-logic' style page (app/styles/layer-logic/page.tsx) and a 'DESIGN_SYSTEM.md' in the same folder. Follow the 'Kinetic Design Protocol': 1. Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with 'IA Stacking' (sections stack vertically with shadow deepening on scroll), internal depth-parallax within cards, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage (useScroll, useTransform). Ensure the code is heavily commented.

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for GridironFlow
tasks.prompt: On branch 'top-20-designs', implement the 'gridiron-flow' style page (app/styles/gridiron-flow/page.tsx) and a 'DESIGN_SYSTEM.md' in the same folder. Follow the 'Kinetic Design Protocol': 1. Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with 'Impact Physics' (camera shake/jolt on element entry), yard-line progress bar that stretches based on scroll velocity, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage. Ensure the code is heavily commented.

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for NeoBrutalism
tasks.prompt: On branch 'top-20-designs', implement the 'neo-brutalism' style page (app/styles/neo-brutalism/page.tsx) and a 'DESIGN_SYSTEM.md' in the same folder. Follow the 'Kinetic Design Protocol': 1. Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with hard-shadow detachment on scroll, snappy 90-degree image rotations on entrance, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage. Ensure the code is heavily commented.

batches.name: Kinetic Update Batch B

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for TerminalCLI

Follow the 'Kinetic Design Protocol': 1. Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with CRT Phosphor persistence effect, blinking cursor that teleports to active scroll sections, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage. Ensure the code is heavily commented.

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for Academia

Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with ink-bleed reveal animations, slow 'unfolding' of paper-textured sections on scroll, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage. Ensure the code is heavily commented.

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for Swiss

tasks.title: Implement Kinetic Protocol for GrowthGrid
tasks.prompt: On branch 'top-20-designs', implement the 'growth-grid' style page (app/styles/growth-grid/page.tsx) and a 'DESIGN_SYSTEM.md' in the same folder. Follow the 'Kinetic Design Protocol': 1. Create DESIGN_SYSTEM.md defining Visual Ethos, Tokens, and Motion Language. 2. Implement page.tsx with a data-driven growth engine theme, featuring interactive data visualizations (charts/graphs) that build on scroll, sticky metrics headers, and high-fidelity Framer Motion usage. Ensure the code is heavily commented.
